extraction.one_line_summary: KITTEL Marcel won his 5th stage in a standard sprint after BODNAR Maciej's solo attempt was caught inside 500m
tactical_patterns: BODNAR solo held 40s at 10km to go despite full peloton chase, suggesting sprint teams were poorly coordinated or lacking committed leadout trains.
FROOME positioned himself near the front in closing kilometers of flat sprint stage, revealing Sky's nervousness about rival crashes despite minimal GC threat.
KITTEL's wheel-jumping positioning described as 'Tetris' - finding gaps between leadout trains rather than following single organized train to the line.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: positioned unusually close to front in sprint finale, indicating heightened crash paranoia on nervous flat stage before Pyrenees
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: required multiple visits from race doctor for wrist injury after crash, catastrophic timing before Pyrenees stage
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: suffered flat tire then separate crash, body language showed psychological defeat beyond physical impact at 5:15 down overall
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: Astana lost Cataldo domestique to crash abandonment, weakening support for 2nd-place GC position before key mountain stage
rider_signals.BODNAR Maciej: positive: time trial power translated to 30km+ solo breakaway that nearly held off entire peloton in last 500m
